programme.desc: Mehmet Arkanın sunumuyla Koy Hasreti Cumartesi Gunu Saat 20:00de Çiftçi TVde!

programme.title: Ece Sukan İle 3S
programme.desc: Moda, stil ve modern yaşamın ritmini ekrana taşıyan bu program, ilham veren konuları samimi ve akıcı sohbetlerle buluşturuyor. Trendler, yaratıcılık ve kişisel ifade biçimleri; guçlu anlatımıyla izleyiciye sadece izleme değil, keşfetme ve duşunme alanı da açıyor.

programme.title: Birlikte Keyifli
programme.desc: Gunluk koşturmacadan uzaklaştıran bu keyifli yapım, sohbet, muzik ve eğlenceli içerikleri bir araya getiriyor. Konukların içten paylaşımları, sıcak diyaloglar ve surpriz anlar sayesinde izleyici kendini samimi bir ortamın parçası gibi hissediyor. Her bolum, yuzleri gulumseten ve ruhu dinlendiren bir deneyim sunuyor.

programme.title: Yaşamın Gucu
programme.desc: Her hafta gerçek bir hastanın yaşam oykusu uzerinden ilerleyen bu program, bilimi duygusal ve insani bir bakış açısıyla ele alıyor. Kanser tedavisindeki guncel gelişmeler, anlaşılır bir dille aktarılırken izleyicinin sağlık okuryazarlığını artırmayı amaçlıyor.

programme.title: Art-e
programme.desc: Sanatın hayal gucuyle gerçeğe meydan okuyan gucu bu programda farklı disiplinlerle buluşuyor. Sahne sanatlarından sinemaya, edebiyattan dijital sanata, muzikten resmin her tonuna uzanan zengin içerikler, izleyiciye ilham veren bir keşif alanı sunuyor.

programme.title: Ekonomi
programme.desc: Ekonomi, finans dunyasının nabzını tutan ve izleyicilere ekonomik gelişmeleri anlaşılır bir dille sunan kapsamlı bir programdır. CNBC ekranlarında yayınlanan program, piyasalardaki hareketlerden yatırım ipuçlarına, iş dunyasındaki onemli gelişmelere kadar geniş bir içerik yelpazesi sunar.

programme.title: Sabah Notları
programme.desc: Piyasaların seyrinden doviz ve emtiaya, gundemin ekonomik başlıklarını içeren, gune bilinçli bir başlangıç yapmak için net ve sade bir bakış sunar.

programme.title: Gazetelerde Bugun
programme.desc: Gazetelerde Bugun, Turkiye ve dunya gundemindeki ekonomi ve genel haberleri detaylı bir şekilde izleyicilere sunan kapsamlı bir programdır. Program, gunluk gazetelerde one çıkan başlıkları, finansal gelişmeleri, siyasi olayları ve toplumsal konuları analiz ederek, izleyicilerin guncel olaylardan haberdar olmasını sağlar.

programme.title: Piyasa Özeti
programme.desc: Finans dunyasındaki gunluk hareketleri sade ve anlaşılır biçimde ekrana taşıyan bu program, borsa, doviz, emtia ve kuresel piyasaları tek çerçevede değerlendirir. Öne çıkan veriler, kritik gelişmeler ve kısa analizlerle izleyici piyasanın yonune hızlıca hâkim olur. Karmaşık rakamlar net yorumlarla anlam kazanır.

programme.title: Konuk
programme.desc: Ekonomi ve finans alanında uzman konukların katıldığı bu program, piyasaların gun içi seyrini derinlemesine ele alır. Borsa, doviz, emtia ve kuresel gelişmeler; yorumlar, karşılaştırmalar ve ozet analizlerle değerlendirilir. İzleyici, rakamların arkasındaki nedenleri oğrenir ve piyasayı bilinçle okur.

programme.title: Para Ekranı
programme.desc: Para Ekranı, gunluk ekonomi haberlerini, piyasa gelişmelerini ve finans dunyasındaki onemli olayları izleyicilere aktaran bilgilendirici bir programdır. Analizler ve yorumlarla ekonomik kararlar desteklenir. İzleyiciler hem bilgi edinir hem de finansal farkındalık kazanır.

programme.title: VİOP Açılış
programme.desc: Piyasalarda gunun nasıl başladığını mercek altına alan bu program, VİOPtaki ilk hareketleri, one çıkan kontratları ve kuresel gelişmelerin etkilerini ele alır. Teknik seviyeler, kısa analizler ve uzman yorumlarıyla olası senaryolar değerlendirilir. Boylece izleyici, gunun yonunu daha net okuyabilir.

programme.title: Analiste Sor
programme.desc: İzleyicilerin ekonomi ve finans dunyasına dair sorularını yanıtlayan bir programdır. Piyasa analizleri, yatırım onerileri ve ekonomik gelişmeler alanında uzman analistler tarafından ele alınır. Program, izleyicilere bilgi sunarken finansal farkındalık kazandırmayı hedefler.

programme.title: Makro Gundem
programme.desc: Kuresel ekonomiyi etkileyen temel dinamikleri ele alan program, makro veriler, merkez bankası kararları ve jeopolitik gelişmeleri uzman yorumlarıyla değerlendirir. Buyume, enflasyon, faiz ve emtia hareketleri izleyiciye anlaşılır bir biçimde aktarılır, piyasaları buyuk resim uzerinden takip etme imkânı sağlanır.

programme.title: Yatırıma Yon Verenler
programme.desc: Yatırıma Yon Verenler, finans dunyasında doğru kararları mercek altına alan program. Borsa, doviz, emtia ve piyasa trendleri uzman yorumlarıyla değerlendirilir. İzleyici, riskleri, fırsatları ve alternatif stratejileri oğrenerek yatırımlarını bilinçle yonlendirme imkânı bulur.

programme.title: Kuresel Gorunum
programme.desc: Kuresel ekonomide one çıkan başlıkları mercek altına alan program, buyume verileri, merkez bankası kararları ve jeopolitik gelişmelerin piyasalara etkisini inceler. Farklı bolgelerden gelen sinyaller uzman yorumlarıyla değerlendirilir. İzleyici, dunya ekonomisini geniş bir perspektiften takip etme fırsatı bulur.

programme.title: Halka Arz Stratejileri
programme.desc: Halka arz stratejileri; şirketin değerlemesi, arz zamanı, yatırımcı profili ve tanıtım surecinin doğru planlanmasını kapsar. Amaç, hem şirketin sermaye ihtiyacını karşılamak hem de yatırımcı guveni sağlayarak uzun vadeli piyasa başarısı elde etmektir.

programme.title: e-Cafe
programme.desc: Gundemin hızına kısa bir ara vermek isteyenler için hazırlanan program, yoğun haber akışı arasında izleyiciye nefes aldıran sohbetler sunar. Ekonomi, kultur ve gunluk yaşam başlıkları sakin bir tempoyla ele alınır. İzleyici, olayların arka planını ve farklı yorumlarını gorerek gundemi takip eder.

programme.title: C-Level
programme.desc: Üst duzey yoneticilerin gundemini şekillendiren ekonomik gelişmeleri ele alan bu program, kuresel trendleri, şirket stratejilerini ve liderlik kararlarını butunluklu bir çerçevede değerlendirir. Makro veriler, sektor dinamikleri ve riskler uzman yorumlarıyla analiz edilir.

programme.title: Haber Bulteni
programme.desc: Gunun one çıkan başlıklarını derli toplu bir şekilde izleyiciye aktaran bu haber bulteni, Turkiye ve dunyadan gelişmeleri hızlı ve anlaşılır bir dille sunar. Siyasetten ekonomiye, sağlıktan kultur-sanata uzanan geniş bir içerik yelpazesiyle gundemin nabzı tutulur.

programme.title: Üretimin Gucu
programme.desc: Üretimin ekonomideki belirleyici rolunu mercek altına alan bu program, sanayi, teknoloji ve insan kaynağı arasındaki ilişkiyi ele alır. Yeni nesil uretim modelleri, verimlilik ve surdurulebilirlik uzman yorumlarıyla değerlendirilir. İzleyici, uretimin kalkınmanın temel gucu olduğunu daha net gorur.

programme.title: Para Ekranı
programme.desc: Finans ve ekonomi gundemi bu programda farklı bir bakış açısıyla ele alınıyor. "Para Ekranı", piyasalardaki hareketlilikten şirket haberlerine, yatırım trendlerinden kuresel gelişmelere kadar geniş bir içerik sunuyor. Uzman konuklar ve analizlerle ekonomi dunyasının nabzı tutuluyor.

programme.title: Kazandıran Strateji
programme.desc: Finans dunyasında doğru kararları mercek altına alan bu program, yatırım araçlarını, piyasa trendlerini ve stratejik hamleleri detaylı inceler. Uzman yorumlarıyla riskler, fırsatlar ve alternatif senaryolar birlikte değerlendirilir. İzleyici, piyasayı bilinçle okumayı ve uzun vadeli duşunmeyi oğrenir.

programme.title: Ekonomi Sohbetleri
programme.desc: Bu program, hem Turkiye hem de global ekonomideki gelişmeleri, fırsatları ve riskleri izleyiciye aktarıyor. Ekonomik veriler, piyasa analizleri ve uzman yorumlarıyla izleyiciler, yatırım ve finansal kararlarını bilinçli bir şekilde alabiliyor. Program, ekonomi dunyasını anlaşılır kılan bir rehber gorevi goruyor.

programme.title: Kuresel Gorunum

programme.title: MathXplosion: Ters Yazı Hakkında
programme.desc: MathXplosion izleyiciyi matematiğin gunluk yaşamla nasıl iç içe olduğunu gosteren eğlenceli bir bilgi programıdır. Kısa bolumlerde sayı, şekil, olçum ve tahmin gibi temel konular eğlenceli etkinliklerle açıklanır. Program matematiksel duşunmeyi teşvik ederek oğrenmeyi keyifli hâle getirir.

programme.title: Denizaltı Kaşifleri: Dev İstridyeler
programme.desc: Denizaltı Kaşifleri, izleyicileri su altı dunyasında keyifli bir keşif yolculuğuna çıkaran animasyon ve gerçek goruntulerle dolu programdır. Okyanus tabanından kıyılara kadar pek çok deniz canlısı ve yaşam alanı tanıtılırken merak uyandıran bilgiler basit ve eğlenceli bir anlatımla sunulur.

programme.title: Darwin ve Newts: Yıldız Avcıları
programme.desc: Darwin ve Newts izleyicileri Yeni Zelandanın doğal ortamında iki kardeşin merak ve hayal gucuyle dolu maceralarına goturen eğitici animasyon programıdır. Darwin ile Newts çevrelerindeki doğa olaylarını ve basit bilimsel ilkeleri keşfederek izleyenlere oğrenmenin keyifli yonlerini gosterir.

programme.title: Darwin ve Newts: Uzay Kaşifleri
programme.desc: Darwin ve Newts izleyicileri Yeni Zelandanın doğal ortamında iki kardeşin merak ve hayal gucuyle dolu maceralarına goturen eğitici animasyon programıdır. Darwin ile Newts çevrelerindeki doğa olaylarını ve basit bilimsel ilkeleri keşfederek izleyenlere oğrenmenin keyifli yonlerini gosterir.

programme.title: Super Kahraman Sprinter Galore: Ayak Masajı
programme.desc: Super Kahraman Sprinter Galore dizisi izleyiciyi kahraman Sprinterın maceralarına goturur. Kendi gezegeni Bhilkada ve etrafında çıkan zorluklarla karşılaşırken Sprinter arkadaşlarıyla birlikte dayanışma ve cesaret gerektiren mucadeleler verir.

programme.title: Super Kahraman Sprinter Galore: Uçma Yarışması
programme.desc: Super Kahraman Sprinter Galore dizisi izleyiciyi kahraman Sprinterın maceralarına goturur. Kendi gezegeni Bhilkada ve etrafında çıkan zorluklarla karşılaşırken Sprinter arkadaşlarıyla birlikte dayanışma ve cesaret gerektiren mucadeleler verir.

programme.title: Addison: Robot Rekabetinin Gizemi
programme.desc: Addison çocuklar için hazırlanmış eğlenceli ve surukleyici animasyon dizisidir.

programme.title: Bitz ve Bob: Cin Bevelın Guzel Evi
programme.desc: Renkli bir dunyada geçen Bitz ve Bob, iki kardeşin gunluk problemleri çozmek için bilimi ve yaratıcılığı kullanmasını anlatır. Bitz planlar kurarken Bob ona neşesiyle eşlik eder. Her bolumde izleyiciler deneme, duşunme ve çozum uretme sureçlerini eğlenceli maceralar eşliğinde keşfeder.

programme.title: Bitz ve Bob: Kalede Pasta Yarışı
programme.desc: Renkli bir dunyada geçen Bitz ve Bob, iki kardeşin gunluk problemleri çozmek için bilimi ve yaratıcılığı kullanmasını anlatır. Bitz planlar kurarken Bob ona neşesiyle eşlik eder. Her bolumde izleyiciler deneme, duşunme ve çozum uretme sureçlerini eğlenceli maceralar eşliğinde keşfeder.

programme.title: Kosmix: Kuiper Kuşağı
programme.desc: Kosmix izleyiciyi uzay macerasına goturen animasyon serisidir. Robot kaşif Kit evrenin farklı bolgelerinde ilginç olaylarla karşılaşır ve her yeni macerasında gezegenler, yıldızlar ve gok cisimleri hakkında temel uzay bilgilerini oğrenir. Bu sureçte izleyici eğlenceli ve oğretici içeriklerle bilime merak duyar.

programme.title: Kosmix

programme.title: Doki: Abraka Doki
programme.desc: Doki izleyiciyi merak ve keşif dolu bir yolculuğa çıkarır. Doki ile arkadaşları Team Doki adıyla dunyayı dolaşırken çevrelerindeki doğa, bilim ve yaşamla ilgili sorularına cevap arar. Her macerada çocuklar yeni yerler, farklı kulturler ve basit bilimsel kavramlar hakkında bilgi edinir.

programme.title: Bitz ve Bob: Kule Üstu Prenses Partisi
programme.desc: Renkli bir dunyada geçen Bitz ve Bob, iki kardeşin gunluk problemleri çozmek için bilimi ve yaratıcılığı kullanmasını anlatır. Bitz planlar kurarken Bob ona neşesiyle eşlik eder. programme.title: Denizaltı Kaşifleri: Deniz Cini
programme.desc: Denizaltı Kaşifleri, izleyicileri su altı dunyasında keyifli bir keşif yolculuğuna çıkaran animasyon ve gerçek goruntulerle dolu programdır. Okyanus tabanından kıyılara kadar pek çok deniz canlısı ve yaşam alanı tanıtılırken merak uyandıran bilgiler basit ve eğlenceli bir anlatımla sunulur.

programme.title: Darwin ve Newts: Guneşin Peşinde

Darwin ile Newts çevrelerindeki doğa olaylarını ve basit bilimsel ilkeleri keşfederek izleyenlere oğrenmenin keyifli yonlerini gosterir.

programme.title: DW News
programme.desc: DW News is news and information channel from a German international broadcaster Deutsche Well (German Wall). It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is more important, reliable source of news.

programme.title: The Day
programme.desc: The news as it happened, presented, clarified and analysed by experts and specialists. Studio-based and in-the field summaries and analysis of the events to have marked the previous twenty-four hours enable understanding and place within a wider context the issues that have shaped, focused and given direction over the course of the previous day.

programme.title: Made in Germany: The Business Magazine
programme.desc: Featuring analysis from experts and interviews with aspiring entrepreneurs, Made in Germany explores the diverse business sector in Germany, revealing how Europes strongest economy affects business across the world. The team of determined reporters travel across Germany and Europe to meet individuals driving the economy and changing the way we work.

programme.title: DW News

It provides latest news from Europe and all around the world in several languages on a daily basis. DW news is informative, entertaining, up-to-date and what is more important, reliable source of news.

programme.title: DW News Focus
programme.desc: Our deep dive format explains the stories that matter _ with clarity, context and journalistic rigor. Each segment goes beyond the headlines to uncover whats driving key developments around the world, featuring sharp analysis, expert voices and exclusive on the ground insights from where events are unfolding.

programme.title: Blood, Sweat, and Sugar - Part 1
programme.desc: Sugar has long played a central role in the global economy. But this lucrative business was also a major driver of both colonialism and slavery. To this day, workers are systematically exploited for sugar production.

programme.title: ENTR
programme.desc: People have been protesting on the streets of Iran since the end of 2025. Theyre demanding change and a new government. And those demonstrations have spread to Europe too, where they include a large number of Iranians living in exile. Among them is 25-year-old Romina, who continues her political activism in Germany.

programme.desc: Eco Africa highlights the innovative and inspiring projects from across Africa and Europe that are being put into practice in a a bid to tackle climate change and support our depleting environments. programme.title: Close up: The Current Affairs Documentary

From drought-stricken vineyards in Chile to new wine regions emerging in Germany, this episode of Transforming Business shows how climate change is reshaping where wine can be made, how it is produced, and who can still compete.

programme.title: Under the Baobab
programme.desc: West Africa is at a crossroads. Coups in Mali, Burkina Faso, and Niger have fueled insecurity and drug trafficking across the ECOWAS region. Sierra Leone has emerged as a loud diplomatic voice, pushing for stability and engaging leaders across the Sahel. But as Freetown steps up abroad, tough questions linger at home.

programme.desc: Bir aile arabasının nasıl sıkı bir ralli arabasına donuşturulduğunu ve modern havacılık endustrisinin bağımlı olduğu titanyum metalinin nasıl elde edildiğini oğreniyoruz.

programme.title: Hurda Avcıları
programme.desc: Drew, takıntılı şekilde sevdiği Kral George donemine ait bir alkol soğutucusuna ilk goruşte aşık olur. Stockport yakınlarındaki bir bungalovda geniş bir koleksiyon saklıdır.

programme.title: Hurda Avcıları: Tamirat
programme.desc: Oyun restorasyoncusu Mark Squires 1960lardan kalma bir tek kollu slot makinesini onarıp baştan yaratır. Metal ustası Ted Edley paslı bir şamandıra fenerini restore eder.

programme.title: Karavan Peşinde
programme.desc: Justin ve Anna, 1959 model bir Airstream Globesterı hızlıca elden çıkararak elde ettikleri gelirle ozel tasarlanmış bir karavan parkı için 10 karavanı restore etmeyi planlıyor.

programme.title: Tamirat Tadilat
programme.desc: Mike sadece 1000 tane uretilen unlu İngiliz aracı MC40lardan birini buluyor. Araç 40 yıl once Monte Carlo yarışını kazanmış. Ant onu eski gorunumune kavuşturabilecek mi acaba?.

programme.title: Avustralyalı Kristal Avcıları
programme.desc: Patrick ve Kirsty milyon dolarlık bir Ametist yatağını gun yuzune çıkarırken, Pete ve Kyle kırılgan ve nadir Krokoit kristallerini çıkarmaya çalışır.

programme.title: Avustralyalı Kristal Avcıları
programme.desc: Patrick milyon dolarlık Ametist yatağını çıkarmak için aşırı sıcaklarla boğuşurken Pete ve Kyle dondurucu soğuklarla mucadele eder.

programme.title: Avustralyalı Opal Avcıları
programme.desc: The Bushmen yeni açılmış bir acil durum kuyusunu kazar. The Mooka Boys, çok onemli bir barınağı vinçle kaldırmak için tehlikeli bir gorev ustlenir.

programme.title: Nasıl Yapılmış?
programme.desc: Gundelik eşyaların nasıl yapıldığını yakın plana almaya devam ediyoruz. Kağıtların uçmasını onleyen cam toplar, fındık kırıcılar, araba kapıları bolumun konularından.

programme.title: Hurda Bizim İşimiz
programme.desc: Ekip, Viktorya tarzı eski bir çiftlik evine gider. Mike ve Robert bir tuğla fabrikasında tuğla ormeyi oğrenirler.

programme.title: İşte Surat İşte Ses
programme.desc: Richard Rawlings Texasın en ucra koşelerinde satın alıp Dallasdaki Gas Monkey garajında tamir edebilmek için unutulmuş ve terk edilmiş klasik arabaları aramaktadır.

programme.title: Nasıl Yapılır?
programme.desc: Dunyanın en iyi kristalleri nasıl uflenir, en ince televizyonlar nasıl uretilir, en derin havuzlar nasıl ısıtılır, en sevilen ketçaptan nasıl gunde bir milyon şişe yapılır?.

programme.title: Nasıl Yapılmış?
programme.desc: Gundelik eşyaların nasıl yapıldığını hiç merak ettiniz mi? Bu harika dizi daha başka çeşitli eşyaları yakın plana alıyor ve nasıl yapıldıklarını açıklıyor.

programme.title: Kindig Garajı
programme.desc: Ekip ulkedeki en iyi 10 arabanın sergileneceği Arizonadaki fuar için hazırlıklar yapar. Dave alet çantasındaki eksiklerini giderir.

programme.title: Tozlu Servet
programme.desc: Matt Paxton ve ekibi, mulk sahiplerinin kârlı koleksiyonlarını temizleyip tasnif etmelerine ve onlara değer biçmelerine yardımcı olur.

programme.title: Mucize Donuşumler
programme.desc: Ekip, country muzik yıldızı Dierks Bentley için eski bir Airstream karavanını yeniler ve bir gaz tankını havalı bir aydınlatma unitesine donuşturur.

programme.title: Mucize Donuşumler
programme.desc: Yaratıcı bir muşteri için bir atolye tasarlarken tum hunerlerini ortaya koyan ekip, renkli ve eski bir pinball makinesini dikiş masasına donuşturur.

programme.title: Kirli İşler
programme.desc: Mike Rowe şehrin altyapısını korumak için Florida Nehrinin bulanık sularına dalarak guçsuzleşen kopru temellerine beton doker.

programme.title: Alaska: Son Sınır
programme.desc: Doğa şartları, başka etmenler ve aile sorunları nedeniyle guçlerinin sınırında yaşayan Kilcherler ailenin zengin kırsal yaşam geleneğini surdurebilmek için birlikte çalışıyorlar.

programme.title: Hurda Bizim İşimiz
programme.desc: Ekip, Virginiadaki Monetada bulunan Smith Dağı Golundeki bir tekneyi kurtarır. Ayrıca, ekibin yeni uyeleri Molly May ile Stella ilk işlerine çıkarlar.

programme.title: Hurda Bizim İşimiz
programme.desc: Dawgs ekibi Trenton Central Lisesine geri doner ve saat kadranlarıyla kutuphane merdivenleri bulur. Mike ile Tay ise eski bir hapishane yatağından masa imal ederler.

programme.title: Goblin Works Garajı
programme.desc: Ant aniden bir 58 Apache ile çıkageliyor. Bu devasa bir kamyon ama Goblin ekibi aracın kaportasını tepeden tırnağa elden geçirerek ona yeni bir hayat vermek istiyor.

programme.title: Tozlu Servet
programme.desc: Matt Paxton ve ekibi, mulk sahiplerinin kârlı koleksiyonlarını temizleyip tasnif etmelerine ve onlara değer biçmelerine yardımcı olur.

programme.title: Mucize Donuşumler

programme.title: Mucize Donuşumler

programme.title: Tamirat Tadilat
programme.desc: Mike, dort vitesinden oturu otoyol hız sınırının altında kalan bir Toyota Land Cruiser buluyor. Ekip alıcılar gelmeden aracı tamir etmeyi başarabilecek mi?.

programme.title: Hurda Avcıları
programme.desc: Modern hazine avcısı Drew Pritchard, ilginç ve nefes kesen objeleri bulmak için Birleşik Krallığı karış karış dolaşıyor. Hazine yığınıyla birlikte mutluluğu da buyuyor.

programme.title: Hurda Avcıları: Tamirat
programme.desc: Mobilya ustası Steveden unlu bir İskoç sarayında kullanılmış dev bir bankı onarması istenir. Yaldız ustası Ruth, Kral George doneminden kalma bir ayna çerçevesini elden geçirir.

programme.title: Tamirat Tadilat
programme.desc: Mike 1980lere donup hayalindeki arabanın bir orneğini iyi bir fiyata buluyor. Ancak kȃr etmesi için tamirat giderini 1000 Sterlinin altında tutması gerek. Mumkun olacak mı acaba?.

programme.title: Unutulmuş Hazineler

programme.title: Bereket Vakti
programme.desc: İmtihan dunyasında ne çok zorlandık... Hızlı aktığını sandığımız zamanın aslında ne kadar da yavaş olduğunu oğrendik her inceliğin ne kadar onemli olduğunu... Ama inandık ve bildik ki her zorluğun ardından bir kolaylık, her karanlığın arkasında bir ferahlık vardır.Şimdi gecenin en koyu karanlığında rabbimizin huzurundayız. programme.title: Ailemin Sohbet Gunluğu

programme.title: Kuran Öğreniyorum
programme.desc: Her şey Okuyla başladı... Çunku kainatın sırrı Kuranın hakikatinde saklıydı. İşte bu yuzden insan Kuranı oğrenmek istedi.

programme.title: Oruç
programme.desc: Emaneti yuklendi insan Secde etti ve yuceldi Tovbe etti ve arındi Ramazana erdi şukretti Oruç tuttu ve ilahi ikrama mazhar oldu Mushafı açtı hamdettiHepsinde niyeti rızaya ermekti. Butun amellerine değer katan niyetlerle koyuldu yola. Yolu guzel kılma adınaSahurla, iftarla yani oruçla, nefsini tuttuİnsanlığa tutunmak için merhametten tuttu. Sabırdan, şukurden, teslimiyetten tuttu Oruçla insan, kendini tuttu.

programme.title: Burhan İşliyen ile Hacı Bayram Kursusunden
programme.desc: Kuran ve sunnetten hareket ederek insan ilişkileri, yaşam tarzları, hayat prensipleri ve kişilerin sorumlulukları anlatılıyor.

programme.title: Serlevha Ayetler
programme.desc: Mukabele sonrasında okunan her cuzden seçilen ayetler ve anlamları Serlevha Ayetlerde!

programme.title: Mukabele
programme.desc: Kuran-ı Kerimden her gun bir cuzun okunduğu programda, her ay Kuran-ı Kerimin tamamı hatmediliyor. Mukabele, izleyicilere Kuran-ı Kerimi okumayı ve anlamayı oğretiyor.

programme.title: Hz. Ömer
programme.desc: Hz. Ömerin cesaretini, adaletini ve tevhid mucadelesi uğruna yaşadığı buyuk tanıklığı seyirciyle buluşturuluyor.

programme.title: İftarı Beklerken
programme.desc: Buruk bir baharda gelse de Ramazan, umutlu olacağız her zaman. Sanmayın ki ayrı kalacağız. Birlikte olacağımız gunlere sabrederek tutacağız oruçlarımızı... Omuzlarımız değmeyecek olsa da secdeye giderken alnımız, hep birlikte âmin diyeceğiz, minarelerden yukselen dualara... Ramazanın rahmetini, bereketini, maneviyatını hep birlikte yaşayacağız.

programme.title: Namaz
programme.desc: Adabından mekruh, sunnet ve vaciplerine kadar her yonuyle ve tatbikiyle namaz hakkında bilinmesi gerekenler ekrana geliyor.

programme.title: Diyanet Ana Haber
programme.desc: Gun içinde yaşanan gelişmeler, gundemde yer alan konular izleyicilere aktarılıyor. Siyasetten ekonomiye, kulturden sanata Turkiye ve dunya gundemine ilişkin onemli gelişmeler ekrana geliyor.

programme.title: Bir Zamanlar Ramazan
programme.desc: Anadoluda Ramazan 3 ayların gelişiyle başlar ve şehirler butun benliğiyle Ramazana hazırlanır.İlk iftar, ilk teravih, ilk sahur; Ramazanın 15i, Kadir Gecesi derken bayramla taçlanır Ramazan ayı! Farklı şehirlerde farklı şekilde, fakat aynı duyguyla yaşanan Ramazan Ayı, o şehri bilenlerin anlatımıyla ekranlarda.

programme.title: Aşr-ı Şerif
programme.desc: Her bolumde Kuran-ı Kerimden onar ayetin okunduğu programda, izleyicileri Kuran ziyafeti yaşatılıyor.

programme.title: Diyanete Soralım
programme.desc: Din İşleri Yuksek Kurulu Üyesi Mehmet Kapukaya, DİB Başkanlık Muşaviri Nurettin Muhtar Acar ve Din İşleri Yuksek Kurulu Uzmanı İdris Bozkurt, gunluk hayata ilişkin sorularınızı İslam ekseninde cevaplıyor.

programme.title: Kuran-ı Kerimi Guzel Okuma Yarışması
programme.desc: Program, bu yıl da Ramazan ayının manevi havasına ayrı bir değer katıp izleyicilere Kuran ziyafeti yaşatıyor.

programme.title: Mavera
programme.desc: Tarihteki ilk Alperenlerin hikayesi Mavera, Yusuf Hemedani tarafından Bağdat’a gonderilen Hace Ahmed Yesevi’nin o donem adeta kuçuk bir dunya olan Bağdat’ta verdiği dirlik ve beraberliğin mucadelesini konu alıyor.Hâce’nin hikmetli nefesi; insanların ruhuna dokundukça, saflar belirginleşiyor. Bir tarafta onu Bağdat’tan gondermek isteyenlerin kurduğu fitne mahfili; diğer tarafta ise Hâce Ahmed’in “Alp” bileğiyle koruyup, “Eren” yureğiyle kucaklayacağı insanlar...

programme.title: Ramazan Hadisleri
programme.desc: Ramazan ayı ile ilgili seçilen 30 Hadis-i Şerif ve bu hadislerden yola çıkarak her bolum için belirlenen bir değerimiz, sanatçı Hasan Aycın tarafından resmediliyor.

programme.desc: Anadoluda Ramazan 3 ayların gelişiyle başlar ve şehirler butun benliğiyle Ramazana hazırlanır.İlk iftar, ilk teravih, ilk sahur; Ramazanın 15i, Kadir Gecesi derken bayramla taçlanır Ramazan ayı! Farklı şehirlerde farklı şekilde, fakat aynı duyguyla yaşanan Ramazan Ayı, o şehri bilenlerin anlatımıyla ekranlarda.

programme.title: Diyanete Soralım
programme.desc: Din İşleri Yuksek Kurulu Üyesi Mehmet Kapukaya, DİB Başkanlık Muşaviri Nurettin Muhtar Acar ve Din İşleri Yuksek Kurulu Uzmanı İdris Bozkurt, gunluk hayata ilişkin sorularınızı İslam ekseninde cevaplıyor.

programme.title: Kuran-ı Kerimi Guzel Okuma Yarışması
programme.desc: Program, bu yıl da Ramazan ayının manevi havasına ayrı bir değer katıp izleyicilere Kuran ziyafeti yaşatıyor.

programme.title: Mavera
programme.desc: Tarihteki ilk Alperenlerin hikayesi Mavera, Yusuf Hemedani tarafından Bağdat’a gonderilen Hace Ahmed Yesevi’nin o donem adeta kuçuk bir dunya olan Bağdat’ta verdiği dirlik ve beraberliğin mucadelesini konu alıyor.Hâce’nin hikmetli nefesi; insanların ruhuna dokundukça, saflar belirginleşiyor. Bir tarafta onu Bağdat’tan gondermek isteyenlerin kurduğu fitne mahfili; diğer tarafta ise Hâce Ahmed’in “Alp” bileğiyle koruyup, “Eren” yureğiyle kucaklayacağı insanlar...

programme.title: Ramazan Hadisleri
programme.desc: Ramazan ayı ile ilgili seçilen 30 Hadis-i Şerif ve bu hadislerden yola çıkarak her bolum için belirlenen bir değerimiz, sanatçı Hasan Aycın tarafından resmediliyor.

programme.title: Kalemin İzinde
programme.desc: Oktay Turkoğlu, hattat Bekir Çetintaş ile selatin camilerimizde yer alan hat sanatının en guzide orneklerini anlatıyor.

programme.title: Bir Gonule Dokunmak
programme.desc: Ramazan ayının dayanışma ve merhamet ruhu ekranlara taşınıyor.

programme.title: Davulcu Orhan
programme.desc: Nesillerdir Ramazan davulculuğu yapan bir ailenin son temsilcisi olan Davulcu Orhanın hem komik hem huzunlu hikayesi konu alınıyor.

programme.title: Hz. Ömer
programme.desc: Hz. Ömerin cesareti, adaleti ve tevhid mucadelesi uğruna yaşadığı buyuk tanıklığı konu alınıyor.

programme.title: Bereket Vakti
programme.desc: İmtihan dunyasında ne çok zorlandık... Hızlı aktığını sandığımız zamanın aslında ne kadar da yavaş olduğunu oğrendik her inceliğin ne kadar onemli olduğunu... Ama inandık ve bildik ki her zorluğun ardından bir kolaylık, her karanlığın arkasında bir ferahlık vardır.Şimdi gecenin en koyu karanlığında rabbimizin huzurundayız. Niyetlendiğimiz oruçlarımızla onun rahmetine talibiz. Ramazanın ikliminde sahurun bereketi orucun huzuruyla ekranlarınızdayız.

programme.title: Jeroen ile Gizemli Yapılar

programme.title: Çifte Kurtuluş: Meksika

programme.title: Hurda Bizim İşimiz

Turkçe popun en guçlu isimleri ve unutulmaz hit parçalar, klipleriyle ekrana gelirken, muzikseverlere nostalji ve guncel ritmi bir arada sunan keyifli bir muzik deneyimi yaşatıyor.

programme.title: Miyu and Litto
programme.desc: Miyu and Litto want you to come on their latest adventure! This is a Duck TV production, designed to both entertain and educate young children. Problem solving and decision making are key to the success of their adventures, along with their trusty colour wheel, too. Will you be able to apply skills of logic and reasoning to help Miyu and Litto in their adventures?

programme.title: Colorwheel
programme.desc: One brave little pup is determined to find his friend, who is lost in the forest. He uses his trusty colour wheel to navigate his way, using skills of reasoning and logic. This programme is a Duck TV production, that intends to educate its audience, alongside entertaining them. In this series, children will develop skills such as problem solving, decision making, and also knowledge around colour.

programme.title: Animals
programme.desc: An educational show which teaches children everything they need to know about all sorts of animals, ranging from a familiar domestic cat or even the wildest of tigers found in the deepest of wildernesses. The programme explores how each and every one of these animals behaves, eats and plays and compares those characteristics to those us humans adopt.

programme.title: Safari
programme.desc: Children can learn about the various wild and not-so wild animals from this well beautifully illustrated safari related programme. It goes on to explore each animals habitats within the environment it lives in but also studies their behaviour. This will provide children with a real insight into animals they already know and some that they may not and include facts that are not always provided.

programme.title: The World of Animals
programme.desc: This childrens cartoon is both educational and entertaining. Children will develop their knowledge on animals, so that they cannot only name animals, but they have a basic understanding of how and where they might live. Children can then apply this knowledge to their everyday lives, either in zoos, or even parks. As a result, children have greater respect for and interest in the environment.

programme.title: Vege-tales
programme.desc: In Veggie-tales, childrens animated series, talking fruit and vegetable perform theatrical productions based on very kind stories. Main characters Bob the Tomato and Larry the Cucumber with the help of other vegetables are telling stories and teaching kids the basic human values, like honesty, thankfulness, kindness.

programme.title: City Life
programme.desc: Learn all about everyday life in the city. Come along as we meet the places, vehicles, people and animals that we find in our city. Walking around and talking to your child about what you are seeing is the best way for them to learn, but City Life is a great introduction for learning about different everyday places, developing social skills, and introducing toddlers to basic objects.

programme.title: Enchanting Sights
programme.desc: Colourful moving geometric shapes, which should enable your child to learn the names of basic shapes. The shapes spin and spiral around the television screen. This enchanting display is accompanied by soothing music. This programme is not only designed to help children in learning the names of shapes, but it allows them to experience colours and music, too, nurturing your childs imagination.

programme.title: India
programme.desc: Want an adventure? Join an Indian boy and his elephant as they travel and explore their own country, visiting the market place and meeting new people! Designed for young audiences to experience various adventures, vibrant colours, smooth animation and music aids children to develop their thinking and observational skills, as well as stimulating their senses!

programme.title: Galaxy Tourists
programme.desc: Galaxy Tourists is out of this world. Following the stories of a trusty space-travelling rocket and his planet-discovering captain, this show is all about the friendship building expeditions and adventures of this space exploring pair. In classic Duck TV style this show stimulates the senses of its young audience and encourages creating thinking and imagination.

programme.title: Listen to This
programme.desc: This fun and colourful cartoon will keep your kids entertained, and also teach them a couple of creative skills on the way, through encouraging young children to pair sounds to animals and musical instruments. The programme will introduce key musical instruments, and improve sound recognition. This is a Duck TV production, designed to aid child development.

programme.title: Mini Fairy Tales
programme.desc: Join the princess, the dragon, the fairies and the elves on their adventures in this mini-series of all your favourite fairy-tales. Designed with education and creativity, Mini Fairy Tales ensures to bring your childs imagination to life, encouraging parents to get involved and participate in telling stories your young ones! Come on an adventure and join in with the fairy-tale!

programme.title: Sea Adventure
programme.desc: Gentle animation set to music. Sea Adventure follows the lives of two lively little fish who are growing up in their natural environment. This show can be used to help teach toddlers new vocabulary.

programme.title: Sport, Sport, Sport
programme.desc: Learning about sports has never been more fun! This exciting animated show teaches us all about different kinds of exercises, physical activity and sports, promoting the benefits of being healthy and encouraging its young viewers to expand their hobbies by exploring new sports. For the littlest viewers, this sport-tastic show promotes motor skills and movement, increasing muscle strength and balance!

programme.title: We Are Playing Now
programme.desc: Educational childrens magazine exploring the world around us, including familiar people and objects through drawing and painting. It helps children develop cognitive skills, as well as parent-child emotional relations, introducing them to different situations.

programme.title: Sunville

Encourage your child to join in with the narration of the stories to help them learn new words, identify objects and sounds, and develop their early social skills. Creatively develop your childs imagination as you discover what an average day looks like in their friendly little village.

programme.title: Color Magic
programme.desc: Watch as happy smiley blobs of paint in red, green, blue and yellow, dance across the screen, colouring in the outlined picture as they go, transforming dull and lifeless pictures into colourful and vibrant masterpieces. Let your imagination run wild with this simple but fun colouring show whilst also developing your basic visual skills, stimulating colour and shape recognition and identification.

programme.title: Enlightment Corner
programme.desc: This show makes learning fun! As with the majority of Duck TVs productions, this cartoon offers both educational and entertainment benefits. Your little ones will no doubt love following these fun little stories, and will also learn to identify everyday objects along the way, and understand their uses, too. This is essential to their development, and will also help them to gain new skills.

programme.title: In the Museum
programme.desc: In a big museum full of beautiful art something peculiar keeps happening. Every now and then an animal disappears from the paintings. Can you help Mr.Clown as he journeys around the museum in search of his missing friends? In a great introduction to different types of art, In the Museum helps to reinforce shape recognition and improve young viewers ability to recognise and identify different animals.

programme.title: Groups
programme.desc: This adorable fox will help your little ones to learn how to categorise objects. This show is enhanced with sufficient interaction with the children that its aimed at, for example the learning of older children is enhanced by asking them questions such as "whats different" between two or more objects. For younger children it is more beneficial to just point out these differences or similarities.

programme.title: Oli - The Cycles of Nature
programme.desc: Give your child a head start, in a way thats fun and exciting, too. programme.title: Beaver Family
programme.desc: This cartoon is designed for very young children. It shows the relationships of a beaver family, and how they go about their everyday lives. This programme has educational benefits, as long as serving to keep young children entertained. This programme is designed to enhance social skills, and develop child-parent relationships, too. It also promotes interaction between parent and baby.

programme.title: The Way We Travel
programme.desc: When viewing this cartoon, your child will watch various vehicles, which will, in turn, make them aware of a variety of different shapes and objects in the real world. They will also observe how they operate, which will allow them to grow an understanding of how they may be used in everyday life, as they see their different parts and hear the noises they make.

programme.title: We Are Playing Now
programme.desc: Educational childrens magazine exploring the world around us, including familiar people and objects through drawing and painting. It helps children develop cognitive skills, as well as parent-child emotional relations, introducing them to different situations.

programme.title: Whats Your Job?
programme.desc: "Whats Your Job" introduces younger audiences to various professions in society and combines education with enjoyment. When watching this series, parents are advised to talk about the jobs that are being shown so that they are able to learn why people do the profession that they do. Encouraging education and fun, this show introduces children to new words that they can learn but in a creative way.

programme.title: Holiday
programme.desc: Join the children as the enjoy their holiday visiting the lake in these silent animated shorts. Follow them as they go on exciting adventures together, exploring the lake and having fun on its sandy shorelines. Learn about the different everyday objects and colours while introducing your children to new multi-sensory activities.

programme.title: Beaver Family
programme.desc: This cartoon is designed for very young children. It shows the relationships of a beaver family, and how they go about their everyday lives. This programme has educational benefits, as long as serving to keep young children entertained. This programme is designed to enhance social skills, and develop child-parent relationships, too. It also promotes interaction between parent and baby.

programme.title: Partners in Fun
programme.desc: Go on countless adventures and mess around with this adorable duo. Join a baby monkey and bear-cub as they play around, making friends and having fun. Young viewers can develop their social skills and learn about the value of friendship whilst experiencing lots of different adventures. Get your little one to interact with the show by identifying colours as they come onto the screen for extra learning.

programme.title: Groups
programme.desc: This adorable fox will help your little ones to learn how to categorise objects. This show is enhanced with sufficient interaction with the children that its aimed at, for example the learning of older children is enhanced by asking them questions such as "whats different" between two or more objects. For younger children it is more beneficial to just point out these differences or similarities.

programme.title: We Are Playing Now
programme.desc: Educational childrens magazine exploring the world around us, including familiar people and objects through drawing and painting. It helps children develop cognitive skills, as well as parent-child emotional relations, introducing them to different situations.

programme.title: Whats Your Job?
programme.desc: "Whats Your Job" introduces younger audiences to various professions in society and combines education with enjoyment. When watching this series, parents are advised to talk about the jobs that are being shown so that they are able to learn why people do the profession that they do. Encouraging education and fun, this show introduces children to new words that they can learn but in a creative way.

programme.title: Listen to This
programme.desc: This fun and colourful cartoon will keep your kids entertained, and also teach them a couple of creative skills on the way, through encouraging young children to pair sounds to animals and musical instruments. The programme will introduce key musical instruments, and improve sound recognition. This is a Duck TV production, designed to aid child development.

programme.title: Enlightment Corner
programme.desc: This show makes learning fun! As with the majority of Duck TVs productions, this cartoon offers both educational and entertainment benefits. Your little ones will no doubt love following these fun little stories, and will also learn to identify everyday objects along the way, and understand their uses, too. This is essential to their development, and will also help them to gain new skills.

programme.title: Safari
programme.desc: Children can learn about the various wild and not-so wild animals from this well beautifully illustrated safari related programme. It goes on to explore each animals habitats within the environment it lives in but also studies their behaviour. This will provide children with a real insight into animals they already know and some that they may not and include facts that are not always provided.

programme.title: Enchanting Sights
programme.desc: Colourful moving geometric shapes, which should enable your child to learn the names of basic shapes. The shapes spin and spiral around the television screen. programme.title: Puffy and Tubby
programme.desc: Join best friends Puffy and Tubby, a couple of guinea pigs who are always hungry, as they embark on journeys around their environment in the search for more and more food. With a focus on developing social skills, identifying new objects and introducing your little ones to various new adventures, Puffy and Tubby excels at combining developmental lessons with endless fun.

programme.title: In the Museum
programme.desc: In a big museum full of beautiful art something peculiar keeps happening. Every now and then an animal disappears from the paintings. Can you help Mr.Clown as he journeys around the museum in search of his missing friends? In a great introduction to different types of art, In the Museum helps to reinforce shape recognition and improve young viewers ability to recognise and identify different animals.

programme.title: World of Toys
programme.desc: This creative kids show for very young viewers welcomes you to the wonderful world of toys. Let your little ones imaginations run wild as children learn through play. Watch games, play, arts and crafts to inspire your pre-schooler.

programme.title: Risto Gusto
programme.desc: Basil, Yam and Oregano have their own restaurant and are always happy to treat their little friends to healthy food and drinks. Its fun for everyone to have a good meal, walk around the park and explore the world around them. Th cartoon stimulates childrens imagination and creativity, and it also has got tranquil sweet tunes that follow every adventure.

programme.title: Hipp-hopp Cactus
programme.desc: Join three houseplants and a busy little bee as they learn more about the objects, shapes and colours they find around their home. Once theyre sure no one is around, the trio of plants come to life and identify where to find them and how to use them properly. Learn up to 20 new words a day as your child has fun labelling the objects they see while searching for them in your own home.

programme.title: Ducky Adventures
programme.desc: Every day is a different adventure for Ducky! This animated show lets toddlers and pre-schoolers to join Ducky to learn through daily activities. This series is brought to you by DuckTV, which works with child psychologists in creating programmes for babies and toddlers. Ducky Adventures has been designed to help your child develop their observational skills whilst also letting them use their imagination and creativity.

programme.title: Doll Team to the Rescue
programme.desc: Bell and her trusty friends Fido the Kangaroo and Lilo the Bear come to the rescue in the forest for anybody that needs it! Doll Team to the Rescue teaches the importance of social skills, friendship and treating animals with love and respect.

programme.title: Fireteam in Action
programme.desc: Fireteam in Action on Duck TV is an animated series revolving around great adventures of firemen. Kids find out about their significant work and learn the importance of helping each other in difficult situations. The series and its sweet characters teach the little viewers to give a helping hand and be responsible.

programme.title: Mimo and Bobo
programme.desc: Mimo, the cute little panda bear and his loyal friend Bobo, encourage you to describe and narrate what you see. Through this show, it will teach your child about developing social skills, teach them the values of friendship and join Mimo and Bobo on their adventures and experience them together! Encourage your little ones and ask them questions about their journey through each episode.

programme.title: India
programme.desc: Want an adventure? Join an Indian boy and his elephant as they travel and explore their own country, visiting the market place and meeting new people! programme.desc: Come and join the dance party! Get up and get moving with these three adorable characters as they dance around the screen to different songs and tunes. programme.title: The World of Animals
programme.desc: This childrens cartoon is both educational and entertaining. Children will develop their knowledge on animals, so that they cannot only name animals, but they have a basic understanding of how and where they might live. Children can then apply this knowledge to their everyday lives, either in zoos, or even parks. As a result, children have greater respect for and interest in the environment.

programme.title: Nature Dudes
programme.desc: Nature Dudes is a fun cartoon that helps its young viewers to learn about all things natural. They focus on teaching about identifying different animals, learning about their different habits and habitats. They also put a focus on seasons and the weather, helping its little viewers learn about rain and sunshine, in a fun and exciting way.

programme.title: Sippi Sappi
programme.desc: Sippi Sappi is an educational show about a couple of friends who love rollerskating around whilst on holiday in the countryside. Aired on Duck TV Sippi Sappi is an all round fun way to get your little ones active and excited about sport.

programme.title: Hubbi Will Take Care of It
programme.desc: Hubbi hippo, Matti beaver and Milo and the ultimate DIY trio, no task is too great for this ferocious three. This cartoon is not only incredibly entertaining, but it promotes problem-solving, and encourages observational and cognitive skills within young children.

Through this show, it will teach your child about developing social skills, teach them the values of friendship and join Mimo and Bobo on their adventures and experience them together! Encourage your little ones and ask them questions about their journey through each episode.

programme.title: Lola and the Numbers
programme.desc: Lola and the Numbers makes counting fun for its littlest viewers. Lola is a playful young girl who helps us to identify different numbers, count from one to ten and develop our pre-math skills. The most important viewing tips for parents and little ones is that we always count with Lola! whether its in English or your own language, counting aling is always fun!

programme.title: Finn and Fianna
programme.desc: Finn and Fianna, the two little elves, are studying their environment and discovering their environment with a lot of curiousity! Getting to know their surroundings and the basic attributes that exist within it, join Finn and Fianna as they use their senses of seeing, tasting, feeling and discovering to develop your little ones thinking skills as well as what they see!

programme.title: In the Museum
programme.desc: In a big museum full of beautiful art something peculiar keeps happening. Every now and then an animal disappears from the paintings. Can you help Mr.Clown as he journeys around the museum in search of his missing friends? In a great introduction to different types of art, In the Museum helps to reinforce shape recognition and improve young viewers ability to recognise and identify different animals.

programme.title: Enchanting Sights
programme.desc: Colourful moving geometric shapes, which should enable your child to learn the names of basic shapes. The shapes spin and spiral around the television screen. This enchanting display is accompanied by soothing music. This programme is not only designed to help children in learning the names of shapes, but it allows them to experience colours and music, too, nurturing your childs imagination.

programme.title: Colorwheel
programme.desc: One brave little pup is determined to find his friend, who is lost in the forest. He uses his trusty colour wheel to navigate his way, using skills of reasoning and logic. This programme is a Duck TV production, that intends to educate its audience, alongside entertaining them. In this series, children will develop skills such as problem solving, decision making, and also knowledge around colour.

programme.title: Enchanting Sights
programme.desc: Colourful moving geometric shapes, which should enable your child to learn the names of basic shapes. The shapes spin and spiral around the television screen. This enchanting display is accompanied by soothing music. This programme is not only designed to help children in learning the names of shapes, but it allows them to experience colours and music, too, nurturing your childs imagination.

programme.title: Groups
programme.desc: This adorable fox will help your little ones to learn how to categorise objects. This show is enhanced with sufficient interaction with the children that its aimed at, for example the learning of older children is enhanced by asking them questions such as "whats different" between two or more objects. For younger children it is more beneficial to just point out these differences or similarities.

programme.title: Monica and Rudy
programme.desc: Monica and Rudy is a colorful animated series on Duck TV intended for the youngest viewers. Monica is a little girl who has a pet- a parrot named Rudy. Monica takes Rudy out of the cage and together they go on their little adventures- in the forest, in the park, or to the pond where they meet different animals and birds. Monica teaches Rudy to imitate the sounds made by the animals.

programme.title: Nature Dudes
programme.desc: Nature Dudes is a fun cartoon that helps its young viewers to learn about all things natural. They focus on teaching about identifying different animals, learning about their different habits and habitats. They also put a focus on seasons and the weather, helping its little viewers learn about rain and sunshine, in a fun and exciting way.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: As is the case with many Duck TV programmes, this programme is designed to both educate and entertain its young audience. This cartoon takes a look into the lives of a range of the cutest baby animals, and explores their family relationships. The cartoon develops social skills and understanding family relationships, alongside improving the ability to recognise different animals, too.

programme.title: Albert Explains
programme.desc: Professor Albert uses his incredible knowledge to demonstrate the use of everyday objects, in this Duck TV production. Duck TV aims to produce content thats both entertaining and informative, so that children may learn new skills in a fun and creative way. In this particular skills, the Professor helps children develop their cognotive skills, so that they can grow up to be as clever as him.

programme.title: Tempo Giusto
programme.desc: Learning about time can be hard, but Tempo Giusto makes it so much fun. Lola uses her love of numbers to tell the time whilst Henry uses his amazing storytelling skills to show us what kids get up to at different times of the day.

The show is educational, stimulating, and informative as well as being fun and entertaining.

They are determined to fix everything, helping everyone they meet along the way. No job is too big for this group of friends. This cartoon is not only incredibly entertaining, but it promotes problem-solving, and encourages observational and cognitive skills within young children.

programme.title: Fireteam in Action
programme.desc: Fireteam in Action on Duck TV is an animated series revolving around great adventures of firemen. Kids find out about their significant work and learn the importance of helping each other in difficult situations. The series and its sweet characters teach the little viewers to give a helping hand and be responsible.

programme.title: Toby McFly
programme.desc: This imaginative and creative childrens animation follows the adventures of Toby McFly, a canine aviator who presents us with a birds eye view of the world. After flying over many fascinating landscapes, active animals, busy people, and interesting places, Toby lands his aircraft and shows us, in detail, what we have just seen from above. The show is educational, stimulating, and informative as well as being fun and entertaining.

programme.title: Sunville - Sportsville
programme.desc: Mister Goat, the Raccoon Family, Kitty Cat and the Friendly Pig are participating in Sports Day, and they want you to come along and join the fun! In doing so, not only will your child have lots of fun, but they will be exercising and developing basic coordination skills along the way. They will also increase muscle strength and sense of balance, which will keep them healthy and happy!

programme.title: Hipp-hopp Cactus
programme.desc: Join three houseplants and a busy little bee as they learn more about the objects, shapes and colours they find around their home. Once theyre sure no one is around, the trio of plants come to life and identify where to find them and how to use them properly. Learn up to 20 new words a day as your child has fun labelling the objects they see while searching for them in your own home.

programme.title: Didy Baby
programme.desc: Go on an adventure with a group of adorable baby animals in Didy Baby. The show teaches its tiny viewers social skills, and introduces them to problem solving and decision making.

programme.title: Dotty, the Kitty
programme.desc: Get creative with Dotty the Kitty and follow the dotted line left by the pencil to try and create a masterpiece. Uncover the final painting and unlock the imagination of your child all at the same time. Dotty the Kitty helps kids to develop their shape recognition, hand-eye coordination and their ability to associate objects with their realistic shapes and colours!

programme.title: Happy Meadow
programme.desc: Two happy rabbits, Sari and Nati have lots of fun playing in Happy Meadow, in this childrens cartoon. They have plenty of other lovable friends who also live in Happy Meadow with them. Duck TV aim to produce content for young children that is educating, and aids their development, while being entertaining at the same time. Children are encouraged to grow their vocabulary and recognise colours.

programme.title: Mimo and Bobo PLUS
programme.desc: Join the two familiar characters who have become preschoolers but still love fun adventures which teach them about various useful things. In their amazing adventures, Mimo and Bobo learn about friendship, sharing, helping others and more, helping children develop their social and observational skills.

programme.title: Raul
programme.desc: Raul and Birdie are best friends. Raul is an adorable green hippopotamus who loves to go on exciting adventures and Birdie is his side kick. These two lovable characters find themselves in all sort of situations as they journey around the countryside, but with each others help they will always find their way out of any problem.

programme.title: Hipp-hopp Cactus

Learn up to 20 new words a day as your child has fun labelling the objects they see while searching for them in your own home.

programme.title: Dinoland
programme.desc: Go on adventures with four adorable baby dinosaurs as they explore their environment and work together to solve tricky problems. Helping young viewers to develop their initial problem solving and decision making skills as well as developing their social skills makes Dinoland the perfect combination of fun and learning. Make the most of these educational lessons with dinosaur puppets or soft toys.

programme.title: Ristorante
programme.desc: Welcome to the Ristorante, come in and find out how the restaurant works. Learn about all the different processes starting with the preparation and moving to the baking or the cooking, the serving and finally to the dish washing. Encourage your little ones to play pretend, cooking up some imaginary treats for you, your friends and family. Learn some new vocabulary, stimulate your senses and having fun.

programme.title: Milo Dino
programme.desc: Following the adventures of a curious little dino boy in the Mesosoic era, as he discovers the world around him. Join Milo and his friends and family to find out how dinosaurs lived. The programme helps little children develop their social skills, as well as their imagination, introducing them to the era of dinosaurs.

programme.title: Connected World
programme.desc: Join the children in this friendly multicultural day-care centre and learn about the diverse heritages of each of the toddlers. Learn where each of the pupils are from and even try to guess their nationalities from their clothing, favourite landmarks and special foods. Help them to narrate the stories and encourage them to be curious about new cultures, languages and countries.

programme.title: Ducky Adventures
programme.desc: Every day is a different adventure for Ducky! This animated show lets toddlers and pre-schoolers to join Ducky to learn through daily activities. This series is brought to you by DuckTV, which works with child psychologists in creating programmes for babies and toddlers. Ducky Adventures has been designed to help your child develop their observational skills whilst also letting them use their imagination and creativity.

programme.desc: Join elf twins Liza and Ben to learn more about sounds, how to find them and how to recreate them. programme.desc: This show encourages creativity, as you learn lots of fun new songs. This skill can be extended to everyday life; sing these songs at bedtime, in the car, on a walk, whenever! programme.desc: Catching up with the adorable bunnies from Happy Meadows, Happy Kingdom introduces lots more fun characters such like a fearless-knight hedgehog and a caring cook-squirrel. Reinforcing the young viewers knowledge of different animals and developing their vocabulary in a new and fun way, Happy Kingdom is just as educational as it is exciting. Why not get involved and host an animal toy party whilst you watch.

programme.title: Mimos World
programme.desc: Join some of our favourite Duck TV characters as they embark on lots of new adventures. Our little panda bear Mimo and his best friend Bobo from "Didy Baby" and "Mimo and Bobo" journey around Mimos world meeting new friends and having fun. This exciting new show puts a massive emphasis on the importance of friendship and teaches us all about different friendship values.

programme.title: Small - But Hardworking
programme.desc: Three elves build a variety of different objects with materials such as wood and ice. This show is designed to be both educational and entertaining. It advances childrens imagination, by stimulating their senses with a bright colourful cartoon. Objects coming to life also enhances the focus on promoting creative imagination. This programme also aids children in beginning to recognise shapes.

programme.title: Hubbi and Friends
programme.desc: Hubbi and Friends are a group of handymen that embark on a series of exciting adventures on their travels through the countryside. They use their passion for fixing to fix everything that they find, even if it doesnt need fixing. The show teaches the incredibly important lesson that its okay to make mistakes, which promotes healthy interactions between parents and children.

programme.title: Fireteam
programme.desc: Hop on board the bright red fire truck and follow the three little firemen as they get to work keeping their village safe. These silent animated shorts are perfect for educating your child on the importance of safety and the role of the emergency services. Encourage your child to develop their ability to problem solve and improve their decision-making skills by identifying hazards and solutions together.

programme.title: Home Sweet Home
programme.desc: As is the case with many Duck TV programmes, this programme is designed to both educate and entertain its young audience. This cartoon takes a look into the lives of a range of the cutest baby animals, and explores their family relationships. The cartoon develops social skills and understanding family relationships, alongside improving the ability to recognise different animals, too.

programme.title: Shaping Up
programme.desc: Join Shaping Up as the happy and smiling geometric shapes introduce shapes to younger audiences and combine to create various objects that children will recognise from their everyday world. Developing babies proper shape-recognition from using vibrant colours a smooth transitions, Shaping Up combines educative aspects so that babies are able to develop their image recognition and creative skills.

programme.title: Ducky and Friends
programme.desc: Childrens programme that follows the amazing adventures of a lovable little duck named Ducky, and a variety of her friends. By watching their escapades, young viewers will have lots of fun, and they will also have a chance to learn about friendship, sharing, and playing nicely with friends.

programme.title: Monica and Rudy
programme.desc: Monica and Rudy is a colorful animated series on Duck TV intended for the youngest viewers. Monica is a little girl who has a pet- a parrot named Rudy. Monica takes Rudy out of the cage and together they go on their little adventures- in the forest, in the park, or to the pond where they meet different animals and birds. Monica teaches Rudy to imitate the sounds made by the animals.

programme.title: Finn and Fianna
programme.desc: Finn and Fianna, the two little elves, are studying their environment and discovering their environment with a lot of curiousity! programme.title: DuckSchool
programme.desc: In a forest kindergarden, woodland animals who call it their home are learning the basics of English from their helpful fairy teacher, Miss Sunshine. Learn some brand new words and practice your counting skills, or listen carefully to the stories Miss Sunshine has to tell. With Duckschool we can learn about so many things! There might even be some special guests to meet along the way.

programme.title: Color Clara
programme.desc: Clara is an extraordinary, extra colourful, chameleon girl. Deep in the jungle in her cosy chameleon house, Clara uses her colour changing powers for good by helping her wrongly coloured jungles friends and objects to return to their natural colour. This exciting jungle tale helps young viewers to connect objects to their usual colours, developing their basic visual skills..

programme.title: Pixie 2
programme.desc: Join Lilali, an elf magician. who just loves to perform his magic tricks. This programme, for very young viewers, can help little ones learn basic vocabulary. Watch with children and repeat the words of the objects on the screen to teach them short, simple words. After you have watched the programme you can repeat the vocabulary from the programme whilst playing to reinforce the words learnt.

programme.title: Monica and Rudy 2
programme.desc: Monica and Rudy are here to introduce little children to the concept of rhythm. The familiar duo go on many exciting adventures in which they encounter amazing animals who help them explore the wonderful world of rhythm through their clapping and tapping.

programme.title: Dotty, the Kitty
programme.desc: Get creative with Dotty the Kitty and follow the dotted line left by the pencil to try and create a masterpiece. Uncover the final painting and unlock the imagination of your child all at the same time. Dotty the Kitty helps kids to develop their shape recognition, hand-eye coordination and their ability to associate objects with their realistic shapes and colours!

programme.title: Dinoland
programme.desc: Go on adventures with four adorable baby dinosaurs as they explore their environment and work together to solve tricky problems. Lola uses her love of numbers to tell the time whilst Henry uses his amazing storytelling skills to show us what kids get up to at different times of the day.

programme.title: Small - But Hardworking
programme.desc: Three elves build a variety of different objects with materials such as wood and ice. This show is designed to be both educational and entertaining. It advances childrens imagination, by stimulating their senses with a bright colourful cartoon. Objects coming to life also enhances the focus on promoting creative imagination. This programme also aids children in beginning to recognise shapes.

programme.title: Zoo
programme.desc: One friendly zoo keeper wants you to come along and meet all the exciting animals hes looking after, and learn a few things on the way, too! This cartoon for young children, encourages them to recognise and name a variety of animals, acquire basic vocabulary, and associate the sounds animals with the sounds that they make.

programme.title: Ristorante
programme.desc: Welcome to the Ristorante, come in and find out how the restaurant works. They will also observe how they operate, which will allow them to grow an understanding of how they may be used in everyday life, as they see their different parts and hear the noises they make.

programme.title: Panni and Fanni
programme.desc: Panni and Fanni the two fairies draw their own versions of a sample picture to help toddlers to develop skills such as associating objects with their shapes and colours and stimulating imagination and creativity.

programme.title: Beaver Family
programme.desc: This cartoon is designed for very young children. It shows the relationships of a beaver family, and how they go about their everyday lives. This programme has educational benefits, as long as serving to keep young children entertained. This programme is designed to enhance social skills, and develop child-parent relationships, too. It also promotes interaction between parent and baby.

programme.title: Partners in Fun
programme.desc: Go on countless adventures and mess around with this adorable duo. Join a baby monkey and bear-cub as they play around, making friends and having fun. Young viewers can develop their social skills and learn about the value of friendship whilst experiencing lots of different adventures. Get your little one to interact with the show by identifying colours as they come onto the screen for extra learning.

programme.title: Colorwheel
programme.desc: One brave little pup is determined to find his friend, who is lost in the forest. He uses his trusty colour wheel to navigate his way, using skills of reasoning and logic. This programme is a Duck TV production, that intends to educate its audience, alongside entertaining them. In this series, children will develop skills such as problem solving, decision making, and also knowledge around colour.

programme.title: Listen to This
programme.desc: This fun and colourful cartoon will keep your kids entertained, and also teach them a couple of creative skills on the way, through encouraging young children to pair sounds to animals and musical instruments. The programme will introduce key musical instruments, and improve sound recognition. This is a Duck TV production, designed to aid child development.

programme.title: In the Museum
programme.desc: In a big museum full of beautiful art something peculiar keeps happening. Every now and then an animal disappears from the paintings. Can you help Mr.Clown as he journeys around the museum in search of his missing friends? In a great introduction to different types of art, In the Museum helps to reinforce shape recognition and improve young viewers ability to recognise and identify different animals.

programme.title: Colorwheel
programme.desc: One brave little pup is determined to find his friend, who is lost in the forest. He uses his trusty colour wheel to navigate his way, using skills of reasoning and logic. This programme is a Duck TV production, that intends to educate its audience, alongside entertaining them. In this series, children will develop skills such as problem solving, decision making, and also knowledge around colour.

programme.title: Whats Your Job?
programme.desc: "Whats Your Job" introduces younger audiences to various professions in society and combines education with enjoyment. When watching this series, parents are advised to talk about the jobs that are being shown so that they are able to learn why people do the profession that they do. Encouraging education and fun, this show introduces children to new words that they can learn but in a creative way.

programme.title: Vege-tales
programme.desc: In Veggie-tales, childrens animated series, talking fruit and vegetable perform theatrical productions based on very kind stories. Main characters Bob the Tomato and Larry the Cucumber with the help of other vegetables are telling stories and teaching kids the basic human values, like honesty, thankfulness, kindness.

programme.title: Enlightment Corner
programme.desc: This show makes learning fun! As with the majority of Duck TVs productions, this cartoon offers both educational and entertainment benefits. Your little ones will no doubt love following these fun little stories, and will also learn to identify everyday objects along the way, and understand their uses, too. This is essential to their development, and will also help them to gain new skills.

programme.title: Miyu and Litto
programme.desc: Miyu and Litto want you to come on their latest adventure! This is a Duck TV production, designed to both entertain and educate young children. Problem solving and decision making are key to the success of their adventures, along with their trusty colour wheel, too. Will you be able to apply skills of logic and reasoning to help Miyu and Litto in their adventures?

programme.title: Shaping Up
programme.desc: Join Shaping Up as the happy and smiling geometric shapes introduce shapes to younger audiences and combine to create various objects that children will recognise from their everyday world. Developing babies proper shape-recognition from using vibrant colours a smooth transitions, Shaping Up combines educative aspects so that babies are able to develop their image recognition and creative skills.

programme.title: Zoo
programme.desc: One friendly zoo keeper wants you to come along and meet all the exciting animals hes looking after, and learn a few things on the way, too! This cartoon for young children, encourages them to recognise and name a variety of animals, acquire basic vocabulary, and associate the sounds animals with the sounds that they make.

programme.title: Mimos World
programme.desc: Join some of our favourite Duck TV characters as they embark on lots of new adventures. Our little panda bear Mimo and his best friend Bobo from "Didy Baby" and "Mimo and Bobo" journey around Mimos world meeting new friends and having fun. This exciting new show puts a massive emphasis on the importance of friendship and teaches us all about different friendship values.

programme.title: Dotty, the Kitty
programme.desc: Get creative with Dotty the Kitty and follow the dotted line left by the pencil to try and create a masterpiece. Uncover the final painting and unlock the imagination of your child all at the same time. Dotty the Kitty helps kids to develop their shape recognition, hand-eye coordination and their ability to associate objects with their realistic shapes and colours!

programme.title: Small - But Hardworking
programme.desc: Three elves build a variety of different objects with materials such as wood and ice. This show is designed to be both educational and entertaining. It advances childrens imagination, by stimulating their senses with a bright colourful cartoon. Objects coming to life also enhances the focus on promoting creative imagination. This programme also aids children in beginning to recognise shapes.

programme.title: Mimos World
programme.desc: Join some of our favourite Duck TV characters as they embark on lots of new adventures. Our little panda bear Mimo and his best friend Bobo from "Didy Baby" and "Mimo and Bobo" journey around Mimos world meeting new friends and having fun. This exciting new show puts a massive emphasis on the importance of friendship and teaches us all about different friendship values.

programme.title: Safari
programme.desc: Children can learn about the various wild and not-so wild animals from this well beautifully illustrated safari related programme. It goes on to explore each animals habitats within the environment it lives in but also studies their behaviour. This will provide children with a real insight into animals they already know and some that they may not and include facts that are not always provided.

programme.title: India
programme.desc: Want an adventure? Join an Indian boy and his elephant as they travel and explore their own country, visiting the market place and meeting new people! Designed for young audiences to experience various adventures, vibrant colours, smooth animation and music aids children to develop their thinking and observational skills, as well as stimulating their senses!

programme.title: Waterworld
programme.desc: Learn how important water is to life on earth. This informative animation is something adults and children can enjoy together, while learning about animal habits and their habitats. Making the world of water come to life, help your child recognise and name animals to increase cognitive processes and strengthen memory. Submerge yourself in a world of fish and dont miss out.

programme.title: Elf World
programme.desc: Two elves join together to explore Dreamworld, and they want you to come along, too! As with many of the Duck TV productions, there is also an educational purpose to this bright and engaging cartoon. This will enhance your childs creativity and encourage them to think creatively, while keeping them entertained throughout.

programme.title: City Life
programme.desc: Learn all about everyday life in the city. Come along as we meet the places, vehicles, people and animals that we find in our city. Walking around and talking to your child about what you are seeing is the best way for them to learn, but City Life is a great introduction for learning about different everyday places, developing social skills, and introducing toddlers to basic objects.

programme.title: Connected World
programme.desc: Join the children in this friendly multicultural day-care centre and learn about the diverse heritages of each of the toddlers. Learn where each of the pupils are from and even try to guess their nationalities from their clothing, favourite landmarks and special foods. Help them to narrate the stories and encourage them to be curious about new cultures, languages and countries.

programme.title: Dinoland
programme.desc: Go on adventures with four adorable baby dinosaurs as they explore their environment and work together to solve tricky problems. Helping young viewers to develop their initial problem solving and decision making skills as well as developing their social skills makes Dinoland the perfect combination of fun and learning. Make the most of these educational lessons with dinosaur puppets or soft toys.

programme.title: Finn and Fianna
programme.desc: Finn and Fianna, the two little elves, are studying their environment and discovering their environment with a lot of curiousity! Getting to know their surroundings and the basic attributes that exist within it, join Finn and Fianna as they use their senses of seeing, tasting, feeling and discovering to develop your little ones thinking skills as well as what they see!

programme.title: Shaping Up

programme.title: Fireteam in Action
programme.desc: Fireteam in Action on Duck TV is an animated series revolving around great adventures of firemen. Kids find out about their significant work and learn the importance of helping each other in difficult situations. The series and its sweet characters teach the little viewers to give a helping hand and be responsible.

programme.title: India

programme.title: Vehicles
programme.desc: In this bright, stimulating cartoon, young children can learn how many different modes of transport work. Not only will they widen their knowledge on transport, they will be entertained and engaged throughout. As is the case with many Duck TV productions, the aim is to entertain and educate. Children will also be encouraged to identify shapes and colours, essential for development.

programme.title: Mini Fairy Tales
programme.desc: Join the princess, the dragon, the fairies and the elves on their adventures in this mini-series of all your favourite fairy-tales. Designed with education and creativity, Mini Fairy Tales ensures to bring your childs imagination to life, encouraging parents to get involved and participate in telling stories your young ones! Come on an adventure and join in with the fairy-tale!

programme.title: Beaver Family
